unmatched.description:
**Chest Tiers: -** _Cash reward is x1.5 in sea 2, x2 in sea 3_
60% Common - 100-1k$
25% Uncommon - 1k-3k$
10% Rare - 3k-5k$
4% Legendary - 5k-10k$
.99% Mythical - 15k$ + 5 Gems
.01% Mimic - 50k$ +  “Little Lamb” boat (exclusive)

**Mimic Chest** (Chest Monster)
A monster chest spawns in place of a normal chest - mimics real chests but attacks you when opened, rewarding players who defeat them with an exclusive item (lamb boat)

_HP: Takes 100 attacks/ticks of any kind to defeat_

_ATK: Deals 10% of ur hp per attack_

‌

Some fruits have cutscenes (Electrcity V, Tremor V, Dragon V, etc) and some bosses have cutscenes (Cthulhu)

unmatched.title: Reputation / Bounty System
unmatched.description:
Conqueror’s Haki doesn’t work on players with 4M+ bounty. You may clash with them instead however.

‌

**Chat Messages when you reach a certain reputation/Bounty**

‌

- 5M+ Reputation:  "The tides grow heavy as PLAYER, a relentless Marine, steps ashore.."
- 10M+ Reputation: "The sea trembles as PLAYER, an unwavering Marine enforcer, arrives with the weight of justice at their back. No pirate is safe from their wrath."

‌

- 5M+ Bonty: “Danger pulses through the seas as [player], makes their entrance!”
- 10M+ bounty: “The seas darken as PLAYER, a notorious pirate, cuts through the waves. Brace yourselves, none will be spared—no soul is safe from their wrath!"

‌

**Summonable Demon** [https://trello.com/c/6wbv6sQN/363-demon-spawner](https://trello.com/c/6wbv6sQN/363-demon-spawner "smartCard-inline")

Players that obtain 25M+ Bounty or Reputation at least once will obtain the Demon Spawner Tool. This summon attacks players for you. Does not attack NPCS.

‌

**Bounty/Reputation Gain**

- If your bounty is below 5M, you’ll only lose/gain 20K bounty per kill/death.
- Once you hit 5M+ bounty, you’ll lose double (40K) per death, and whoever killed you will gain only 20K per kill. This counters inflation.
- You CANT lose bounty if your bounty is below 100K. So the LEAST bounty you can lose is 5K (5% of 100k).
- Bounty will be obtainable from Superbosses until you hit 3M bounty. The only way to gain more bounty from now on is to defeat players.
- Bounty be obtained from killing Island Bosses x 2. So a lv 25 boss will give 50 bounty. Notif: “You’ve gained 50 bounty from defeating a boss.”
- Bounty will be obtainable from Island bosses until you hit 1M bounty.
- Superbosses give bounty = to their level x 50. So a lv500 superboss will give 25,000 bounty. Message “You’ve gained 5,000 bounty from defeating a superboss.”
- If you die to an NPC, you’ll lose bounty = to that npc’s level.
- If the level different is more than 1000, you won’t gain/lose bounty to that player. So if level 4000 dies to a level 2999, they won’t gain/lose. “No bounty gained/lost, level difference too high.”

‌

**Penalty:**

- If the enemy leaves the game while in combat, the killer's POV will say: <Player Name> has left the game and will been penalized!
- The next time that player joins they will lose  however much they were meant to lose. If player has <100k bounty, they won’t be penalized.

‌

‌

**Marine Titles**

- Add a title “Marine Officer” - obtained at 1M reputation
- Add a title “Marine Captain” - obtained at 3M reputation
- Add a title “Marine Admiral” - obtained at 10M reputation
- Add a title “Fleet Admiral” - obtained at 20M reputation

**Pirate Titles**

- Bounty Hunter at 1M bounty _(already ingame)_
- Sea Tyrant at 3M bounty _(already ingame)_
- Sea Warlord at 10M bounty
- Sea Emperor at 20M bounty

unmatched.title: Mastery System
unmatched.description:
‌

---

All style/fruit/sword skills will have their first skill unlocked free at 0 mastery req.

In order to unlock all skills players must increase mastery of said style/fruit/sword and unlock each skill incrementally (0, 25, 50, 75, 100, 125, and so on)

> Z + F = Free
> X = 25 Mastery
> C = 50 Mastery
> V = 75 Mastery
> B = 100 Mastery
> E = 125 Mastery
> N = 150 Mastery (as of now only gum/drag has this key)
> P = 175 Mastery (as of now only gum has this key)

Mastery EXP system:

> M1s: 0.1 EXP
> Skill: 1 EXP
> NPC: 2 EXP
> Boss: 10 EXP
> Superboss: 150 EXP

Max mastery: 500

Every 2 mastery level adds +1 point to that stat (combat/fruit/sword) at a max of 250.

If an npc/boss/superboss level is <200 yours, you will only gain 0.2x EXP. <3000 for superbosses

‌

```
If Mastery < 125:
EXP to next = 4 + floor(Mastery / 20)

If Mastery >= 125:
EXP to next = 10 + floor(Mastery / 6) - 20 + floor((Mastery - 125) / 4)
```

‌

**Mastery Titles**

- Title Edge Sovereign - Max mastery on any sword
- Title Archon of Power - Max mastery on any fruit
- Title Supreme Brawler - Max mastery on any fighting style
- Title “Avatar of Combat” - Max mastery on atleast 5 fighting styles
- Title “Warlord of Blades” - Max mastery on at least 5 swords
- Title “Harbinger of Power” - Max mastery on at least 5 fruits
  \-

unmatched.title: Damage Sheet
unmatched.description:
**--------------- Fighting Style/SWORD/FRUIT Balance Sheet ---------------**

This is how damages for punch, sword, and fruit is calculated.

If a skill does more than 1 tick, the damage will be automatically multiplied by 1.5x for balancing purposes.

Every 2 mastery will grant +1 stat to that sword/style/fruit. For Example: 500 Mastery on a fruit will grant +250 Fruit stat.

**COMBAT/Fighting Style**
Combat Skill 1 damage = (5+0.3_Combat Stat) x 2.0 x **Style Multiplier (below)**
Combat Skill 2 damage = (5+0.3_Combat Stat) x 2.2
Combat Skill 3 damage = (5+0.3_Combat Stat) x 2.4
Combat Skill 4 damage = (5+0.3_Combat Stat) x 2.6

‌

**SWORD**
Sword Skill 1 damage = (5+0.3_Sword Stat) x 2.0 x **Swd Multiplier (below)**
Sword Skill 2 damage =  (5+0.3_Sword Stat) x 2.2
Sword Skill 3 damage =  (5+0.3_Sword Stat) x 2.4
Sword Skill 4 damage =  (5+0.3_Sword Stat) x 2.6
Sword Skill 5 damage =  (5+0.3*Sword Stat) x 3.0

‌

**FRUIT**
Fruit Skill 1 damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x  **2.0 x Fruit Multiplier (below)**
_Fruit Skill 2 damage =(5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x  **2.2**_
_Fruit Skill 3 damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x  **2.4**_
_Fruit Skill 4 damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x **2.6**_
_Fruit Skill 5 damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x  **3.0**_
_Fruit Skill 6 damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x  **3.2**_

F hotkey:

_Fruit Skill F damage = (5+0.3_Fruit Stat) x **2.6**_

‌

**---------------  Damage Calculation per Style Rarity ---------------**

**Common**  (no buff)

Combat

**Legendary** (15% damage buff to all moves)

Blackleg, Electro, Cyborg, Dragon Claw, Fishman

**Mythical** (20% damage buff to all moves)

Blackleg v2, Electro v2, Cyborg v2, Dragon Claw v2, Fishman v2

**---------------  Damage Calculation per SWORD Rarity --------------**

**Common**  (no buff)

Starter Katana, Shark Blade

**Uncommon** (5% damage buff to all moves)

**Rare** (10% damage buff to all moves)

**Legendary** (15% damage buff to all moves)

**Mythical** (20% damage buff to all moves)

**---------------  Damage Calculation per Fruit Rarity ---------------**

**Common**  (regular damage)

**Uncommon** (5% damage buff to all moves)

**Rare** (10% damage buff to all moves)

**Legendary** (15% damage buff to all moves)

**Mythical** (20% damage buff to all moves)

‌

**Fruit Awakenings will grant +5% damage. For example:**

Dragon Base → Hybrid (+5%)

Gum → Gear 2nd. (+5%) → Gear 4th (+5%) → Gear 5th (+5%)

Electricity → Electricity Awakening (+5%)

unmatched.title: Conqueror Clashing
unmatched.description:
When two players activate Conqueror’s Haki within a short radius of eachother (300 studs) → it will trigger a forced Clash State

The two players who lock in this state will temporarily be immortal until the clash ends.

In order to win this clash, each player must play a minigame: Hit bubbles that appear on their screen in random locations as fast as they can before the other player.

Whoever hits all 10-20 bubbles first will win the clash.

If neither party hits X amount of bubbles within 10 seconds, it will cancel the clash. Message "Clash Cancelled!"

**Possible outcomes:**

- You win. Enemy gets knocked back + stunned + take dmg
- You lose. You get knocked back + stunned + take dmg
- No one wins. Both players took too long to complete the minigame. Message “Clashing Canceled!”

‌

Titles

- Title “Conqueror Of Wills” - Win a conqueror clashing once

---

---

Spawn Time : 60 minutes (1 hour)

Despawn Time : 20 minutes **AFTER** the fruit has spawned

----
**Logia Effect:**

- Logia is the rarest of the three Devil Fruit types. Those who have eaten a Logia fruit are granted the power to transform their body's composition into a natural element at will, as well as create and control it. Enemies will need to use Buso Haki to hit a Logia user. Fruit attacks can also hit a Logia user.

**You must be 5 levels above NPC for Logia Effect to work.**

**Won't work with boss-level NPCs**

---

All Devil Fruit users will lose the ability swim. They will take damage when submerged in water.

unmatched.description:
‌

**Race V1: _Spun at start menu_**

- _Human_ = +25% Walkspeed under 70% hp
- Beastborne = +20% Walkspeed, +5% Stamina
- _Skyborne_ = +50% Boost on first Skywalk
- _Fishborne_ = +50% Swim Speed
- _Demon_ = 2.5% Life Steal
- _Dragonborne_ = +10% Health + +10% Health Regen + 25% Boost on first Skywalk
- _D. Clan **=**_ +5% Health, +5% Stamina, +Conquerors (cost 250 stam)

**Race V2: _Level 2200 Required to take quest_**

- _Human_ = +50% Walkspeed under 70% hp +1 Observation Dodge
- Beastborne = +50% Walkspeed, +10% Stamina
- _Skyborne_ = +Glide Ability(hold space to fall 2x slower), +First skywalk is x2 powerful
- _Fishborne_ = 2x Swim Speed, x2 Walkspeed for 4 seconds after hopping out of water, Water Immunity (Fruit Users)
- _Demon_ = 3% Life Steal +10% chance to summon a hellfire circle on dash that deals dmg.
- _Dragonborne_ = +10% Health + Glide Ability (hold space to fall 2x slower)
- _D. Clan_ **= +** 10% Health, +10% Stamina, +Conquerors cost 50 less stam (200)

‌

‌

**Race V2 Obtainment** [https://trello.com/c/djBLsFNz/371-race-engineer-v2-obtainment](https://trello.com/c/djBLsFNz/371-race-engineer-v2-obtainment "smartCard-inline")

- Quest 1: Defeat a sea beast
- Quest 2: Collect 50 Chests around the map
- Quest 3: Defeat Zenith Boss
- Afterwards pay 1M$ + 100 Gems to unlock Race V2. This Quest can be repeated for any other races as well to unlock their V2 variants.

unmatched.description:
### Located in Sea 2: [**Flower Capital**](https://trello.com/c/DdIANnSm "‌") - Spawn

---

**INFO**

- Buso dmg buff will only buff styles and swords skills. It will NOT buff fruit skill dmg.
- ;busoexp me sets your atks thrown

‌

**Buso Expert NPC**

"These seas have seen many, but none channel Haki like I do... Your current Buso level is [Buso Level]. You've thrown [Amount] strikes imbued with Haki so far. But you're not ready to advance this skill just yet..."

_(exp = how many attacks you’ve thrown USING buso)_

Level 1 - +2.5% dmg (Level 350, 100k$)

Level 2 - +5% dmg (5k exp)

Level 3 - +7.5% dmg (20k exp)

Level 4 - +10% dmg (50k exp)

Level 5 - +15% dmg + 10% dmg resistance (100k exp + QUEST)

**Titles:**

Title “Ironfist” - Obtain lv 1 buso (already ingame)

Title “Void-Forged Arms” - Obtain lv 5 buso

‌

**Buso Level 5 Quest**

_Requirements to evolve: 100k exp_

Dialogue 1 for when 100k EXP is met  "You've delivered [amount] Haki-infused strikes so far and your armament level is [number]. It seems you've finally proven yourself worthy to learn this secret technique—one that grants deeper understanding and power."

Dialogue 2 “The first step to mastering this skill is learning to withstand pain. To build true resistance, you must endure 1,000 strikes from enemies without backing down.”

_(dialogue shows only if they haven’t been hit 1000 times.)_ “You’ve only taken [amount] punches so far. Return to me after you've endured 1,000 hits."

Dialogue 3 “You’ve proven your resolve. With 200 gems, I shall bestow upon you the final secret of Armament. Would you like to learn?” Y/N

Dialogue 4 “You've delivered [amount] Haki-infused strikes so far and your armament level is [number]. You have reached the maximum level of this haki.”

unmatched.title: Observation Expert (Evolution)
unmatched.description:
### Located in Sea 2: [**Flower Capital**](https://trello.com/c/DdIANnSm "‌") - Spawn

---

**Observation Expert NPC**

_Observation Expert_ (NPC)

Dialogue for obs level 1-5 “I’m the observation expert in these seas. Your current level is [obs level]. You have dodged [amount] of attacks so far. You aren’t ready to evolve this skill yet..”

‌

After buying obs haki lv 1 for money. It can ONLY be evolved with dodging enemies. This will be an NPC in sea 2 that will count your dodges.

_(exp = how many attacks you’ve dodged)_

Level 1 - 3 Dodges (0 exp)

Level 2 - 4 Dodges (100 exp)

Level 3 - 5 Dodges (500 exp)

Level 4 - 6 Dodges (2000 exp)

Level 5 - 7 Dodges (3000 exp)

Level 6 - 8 Dodges (4000 exp + QUEST) - (See more info BELOW)

‌

_Level 6 level will grant these perks:_

- 8 Dodges
- See players on dif islands / farther away (10x)  (doesn’t render their body only name and bulletpoint of where they are)
- See players HP/STAM/Level + HOTBAR (Level/Fruit/Sword/Style they’re using)     (range limited to 250 studs only)

‌

**Observation Level 6 Quest**

_Requirements to evolve: 4000 EXP_

Dialogue 1 for when 4000 EXP is met  “I’m the observation expert in these seas. You have dodged [amount] of attacks so far. I see you’re finally ready to learn this secret skill that will give you further insight.”

Dialogue 2 “First step’s first. Hunt 5 players for me to prove you’re worth teaching this skill.” (dialogue shows only if they dont have 5 player kills.)

Dialogue 3 “Good work. Now, the final task i have for you is to defeat 10 island bosses in this sea. Go on now..” (player must then defeat 10 dif island bosses in sea 2)

Dialogue 4 “Excellent work. I can teach you this skill for a price of 10M$. This will allow you to see players further away, increase dodges, allow you to see players hotbar, and stamina. Would you like to learn?” Y/N

Dialogue 5 “You’ve already learnt this!”

‌

_Total requirements: 4000 dodges/xp, 5 Player Hunted, Defeat all sea 2 island bosses, 10M$_

‌

_Level 6 level will grant these perks:_

- 8 Dodges
- See players on dif islands / farther away (10x)  (doesn’t render their body only name and bulletpoint of where they are)
- See players HP/STAM/Level + HOTBAR (Level/Fruit/Sword/Style they’re using)     (range limited to 1000 studs only)

‌

**Ultra Instinct Quest**

_Completing this quest will give the player an ultra instinct skin + Title. No buffs, purely cosmetic._

‌

Once player hits 20K dodges, the NPC dialogue will change from:

Dialogue 5 “You’ve already learnt this!”

to

Dialogue 6 “You’ve unlocked a hidden secret! Would you like to obtain the cosmetic ultra instinct skin and title for 2 Shrine Relics + 1000 Gems?” Y/N

‌

**Titles**

Clairvoyant - Have observation haki lv1

The All-Seeing - Obtain observation level 6

Ultra Instinct - Have the ultra instinct skin (quest)

---

### :apple: **Fruit Storage NPC**

Similar to the Race Archivist NPC, the Fruit Storage NPC allows players to save powerful fruits for future use instead of permanently losing them when switching to another fruit.

This creates a meaningful progression system where players can experiment with different fruits without permanently losing favorites.

**Fruit Storage Slots**

- Slot 1 - 1000 Gems
- Slot 2 - 3000 Gems
- Slot 3 - 5000 Gems

Requirements

- Players may only store fruits that have reached 400 Mastery or higher.

**Rules**

- Equipping a stored fruit replaces the player's current fruit.
- Fruits remain stored permanently unless replaced

unmatched.title: Cthulhu Boss (Unreleased)
unmatched.description:
‌

Level 10,000 Boss (two health bars)

Cthulu Spawned via prismatic shard during the storm window [every 2H 35M].

Prismatic Shard must be crafted via Doran the Forge using 5 mythical materials (phantom lantern, dragon heart, seabeast heart, raijin core, saturn’s ring)

This boss does NOT have a 20 minute despawn timer like the other bosses. It roams infinitely until death.

The shard must be fed to a whirlpool in the sea that appears during storm.

‌

**Upon summon:**

- Ocean becomes nearly black
- Forced nighttime begins. Until his death.
- Low rumble SFX starts
- Screen distortion affects all players for X seconds

> Server Message: “Something ancient has awakened beneath the sea…”

**Boss Behavior**

- Cthulhu roams in a square pattern like Ghostship
- Uses slow walking animation while roaming
- If a player enters aggro range, Cthulhu stops moving and begins combat
- If all players leave range, Cthulhu resumes roaming
- Boss does not despawn on a timer

‌

**Boss has two lives/Health Bars.**

Once the sea form is completely defeated, a cutscene will occur to all players within 2000-3000 stud range, then an explosion of VFX where he's resurrected and starts flying.

**First Form:** - Legs will be submerged in the water.

> Z | Eternal Rage: Ominous red scream that deals rapid damage to all nearby enemies. 10x ticks. - Feel free to reference our conq haki or dragon roar.
>
> X | Divine Beam - Boss will charge a beam for, before releasing it towards ALL enemies within range, causing constant damage to each player (10x ticks).
>
> C | Devilish Clap: Boss will clap his hands together (there will be a startup). After clapping, a MASSIVE explosion of shockwaves + water will emit, damaging everyone within range & knocking them backwards about 200-500 studs. (1x tick)

**AIR FORM** - This will be AFTER resurrection where he jump up into the air flying.

> Z | Tornado Havoc: Boss will summon tornadoes on ALL nearby players. This will cause players to fly up into the air & be suspended/stunned for a short period of time. 10 ticks.
>
> X | Air Prison: All nearby enemies will become trapped in a prison that brings the player closer to the boss. Deals 1x tick.
>
> C | Eternal Rage: Ominous red scream that deals rapid damage to all nearby enemies. 10x ticks. - Copy of the previous skill.

‌

Drops:

- 100% Abyssal Eye (Race V3, Abyssal Necklace, DDB/ Free DB)
- Guaranteed Legendary+ fruit to whoever deals most dmg (80% legendary/20% myth chance)
- 10% Abyssal Haki Color Change (Black-Purple)
- 5 Levels/250 Gems/500k$

‌

**Titles:**

- Title “Slayer of the Abyss” - Defeat Cthulhu
- Title “Emperor of the Abyss” - Defeat Cthulhu 10 times
- Title “Knight of the Stagnant Abyss” - Deal the most damage to Chutulu
- Title “Bearer of the Abyss” - Obtain the Abyssal Haki Color

Upon defeating the ship, it will crash into the water, causing an explosion as it slowly sinks into the sea. A chest will spawn on the deck, players have 20 seconds to open this chest. Chest will be on local server so each player opens their own chest. Add a timer ontop of the chest “20 seconds to claim..”

> Ghost Chest Reward:
>
> - Ghastly Haki Color -  (10% chance) - makes your haki radiate from dark to bright green slowly + custom smoke vfx
> - 5 Race Spins (10% chance)
> - 1 random fruit (rare+)

**Titles**

- Title “Phantom Hunter” - Defeat 1 ghost ships
- Title “Reaper of Lost Souls” - Defeat 10 ghost ships
- Title “Ghastly Aura” - Obtain the ghastly haki color from ghostship chest

unmatched.description:
Sells a blade fragment + a relic. Spawns in 1 of 4 locations in sea 3 every 1H30M-2H30M. Leaves after 7 min or if items are bought.

‌

Spawns in a random location in sea 3 every 1H 30M to 2H 30M.

Chat message:

> “A rare trader has entered the seas… his wares won’t last long.”

Sells

- Blade Fragment for 300k$

Each item can only be purchased once. If you buy out his stock, he will disappear until he re-appears.

> “A deal has been struck… the merchant vanishes.”

If his stock isn’t bought out, he automatically leaves in 7 minutes.

> "The merchant slips away into the shadows..."
>
> ‌

- Title "Black Market Hunter" - Find and make a deal 10 times with the traveling merchant

unmatched.title: Sea Shrine
unmatched.description:
**Treasure Shrine Raid**

There will be a treasure vault shrine ( )  that spawns in 1 of 3 locations in sea 2 which occurs every 1 hour and 45 minutes after the previous raid ends. Spawns in 3 dif locations.

‌

To succeed, players must destroy the shrine's central treasure chest within 5 minutes (2-3M HP). If they fail, the doors will close, and the vault will flood with rising water, and all players still inside will be killed instantly.

**Server Messages:**

- "The treasure shrine has been spotted in the sea.." - this message will appear 30 seconds before raid starts
- "WARNING: The shrine has surfaced. You have 5 minutes to destroy the central vault!" - The shrine will spawn for 5 minutes.
- "WARNING: The vault was not destroyed in time and the shrine is now sinking." - Players failed to destroy the core chest in 5 minutes.
- "Success. The vault has been destroyed in time!" - Players destroyed the core chest in 5 minutes successfully.
- "You have dealt the the most damage and will be rewarded a random rare+ fruit!" - will only appear to the player who dealt the most dmg
- "You have dealt atleast 10% dmg and have been awarded!" - will only appear to anyone who dealt atleast 10% dmg

**Rewards**

All players who deal at least 10% damage to the treasure chest will earn the following rewards:

30,000 - 80,000 money
1 Level

25 Gems
100% Shrine Relic (legendary material)

Only player who inflicts the MOST damage will receive a random Rare+ fruit. (Chances = to Robux Spin in shop)

‌

**Titles**

**The MVP:** Get a fruit from the shrine raid (meaning you did the most damage)

**Shrine Plundere**: defeat 1 shrine
**Shrine Conqueror**: defeat 20 shrines
**Relic Raider**: defeat 100 shrines
**Drowned:** Die to shrine by drowning

unmatched.title: Storm
unmatched.description:
Every 2H 35M a storm occurs in sea 2 and sea 3 for exactly 10 minutes

‌

Within this 10 min Zenith Boss will spawn in Shadow Island (underground) - required for Zenith Sword (3SS quest) and Race V2 Quest.

‌

In sea 3 storm will play a key role in Ghostship and Cthulhu boss.

‌

‌

‌

**Ghost Ship Spawn Method (UNRELEASED)**

Green ghost alatar will appear in the sea 3 (location near starter island) during storm (every 2H 35M)

> You must sacrifice 20 points worth of fruits to summon ghost ship.
>
> Common Fruits = 1 points
>
> Uncommon = 3 points
>
> Rare = 5 points
>
> Legendary = 15 points
>
> Mythic = 20 (instant spawn)

‌

> Spawn Message: “A phantom ship rises from the abyss…”

‌

‌

‌

**Cthulhu Endgame Boss** (UNRELEASED)

Level 10,000 Boss (two health bars)

Cthulu Spawned via prismatic shard during the storm window [every 2H 35M].

Prismatic Shard must be crafted via Doran the Forge using 5 mythical materials (phantom lantern, dragon heart, seabeast heart, raijin core, saturn’s ring)

This boss does NOT have a 20 minute despawn timer like the other bosses. It roams infinitely until death.

The shard must be fed to a whirlpool in the sea that appears during storm.

**Upon summon:**

- Ocean becomes nearly black
- Forced nighttime begins. Until his death.
- Screen distortion affects all players for X seconds

> Server Message: “Something ancient has awakened beneath the sea…”

additional titles:

Requirement: Evolve all 5 styles in-game to their V2 form, and have 300+ mastery on all of them.
